entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company; has dedicated folder for company files

entities.name: Trash, Don't Delete
entities.context: Principle: move files to Trash/ for recovery instead of permanent deletion

entities.name: Protected Files
entities.context: Principle: never touch hidden/system files during cleanup

entities.name: DELETE_PATTERNS
entities.context: Python list in cleanup script defining files to auto-delete

entities.name: ASK_PATTERNS
entities.context: Python list in cleanup script defining files needing human review

entities.name: Trash/
entities.context: Recovery directory where deleted files are moved

entities.name: conversation-end cleanup
entities.context: Process for aggressive cleanup of workspace root as part of conversation close

entities.name: Workspace hygiene
entities.context: Principle: root should be clean; persistent files belong in proper directories

relationships.context: Cleanup process uses DELETE_PATTERNS to identify files for removal
Cleanup process uses ASK_PATTERNS for files needing review
Persistent knowledge should be filed in Knowledge/, not root
Company files should be filed in Careerspan/, not root
